cover: System architecture diagram: 'Building a Reasoning Agent with o3 and Salesforce'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'OPENAI o3 + SALESFORCE REASONING AGENT'. Subtitle 'Planner, Salesforce tool facade, audit trail, Agentforce 2.0 handoff'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Reasoning Layer' (pastel blue): modules 'o3 Planner', 'Policy Evaluator', 'Decision Trace'. LAYER 2 'Salesforce Tool Layer' (pastel green): modules 'Case Lookup API v64.0', 'Entitlement Check Apex', 'Agentforce 2.0 Handoff'. LAYER 3 'Trust Layer' (pastel amber): modules 'PII Redaction', 'Tool Allowlist', 'Audit Log'. Central node 'Reasoning Loop' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): 'OpenAI Responses API' and 'Salesforce REST v64.0'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Production Guardrails': sub-modules 'Timeouts', 'Human Approval', 'Telemetry' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'o3 Reasoning Agent Boundary in Salesforce'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'REASONING MODEL ≠ SYSTEM OF RECORD'. Subtitle 'Keep decisions explainable, keep data controlled'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Reasoning with branching policy using brain circuit icon', 'Salesforce API v64.0 tool facade using shield database icon', 'Agentforce 2.0 handoff using headset agent icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: Model Gets Raw Access' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Model Calls Approved Tools' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'SELECT Id, SSN__c, Revenue__c FROM Account' and 'sessionId = userSessionId', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'getCaseFacts(caseId)' and 'evaluateEntitlement(assetId, accountId)'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Tool allowlist', 'PII minimization', 'Audit every decision'. Footer bar: 'o3 reasons over facts — Salesforce controls access and writes'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Apex Tool Facade for o3 Agents'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'CONTROLLED SALESFORCE TOOLS'. Subtitle 'Expose business decisions, not raw org access'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'with sharing enforces access with shield icon', 'SOQL limits data shape with query icon', 'Audit object tracks every call with ledger icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: Agent Builds SOQL' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Apex Evaluates Policy' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'SELECT Id, AnnualRevenue, SSN__c FROM Account WHERE Name LIKE input', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'EntitlementEvaluationResource.evaluate(assetId, accountId)' and 'response.recommendedSla = \"2-hour response\"'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Validate IDs', 'Return typed JSON', 'Log tool calls'. Footer bar: 'The model asks questions — Apex answers with governed facts'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
